Special thanks : Παναγιώτης Γιαννούλης

Στίχοι

ΜΟΥ ΕΙΠΕΣ «ΓΕΙΑ ΣΟΥ, ΧΑΡΗΚΑ»
ΜΕ ΚΟΙΤΑΞΕΣ ΚΑΡΦΙ ΚΑΤΑΜΑΤΑ
ΣΟΥ ΕΙΠΑ «ΣΤΑΣΟΥ, ΜΗ ΒΙΑΖΕΣΑΙ»

ΜΑ ΚΑΘΕ ΠΡΑΓΜΑ ΣΤΟΝ ΚΑΙΡΟ ΤΟΥ 
ΚΑΙ Ο ΕΡΩΤΑΣ ΑΠΟΨΕ... 

ΡΕΦΡΕΝ
ΣΤΑ ΚΑΛΥΤΕΡΑ ΠΟΥ ΕΛΚΟΝΤΑΙ
ΠΟΥ ΔΕΝ ΑΠΟΦΕΥΓΟΝΤΑΙ 
ΣΤΑ ΩΡΑΙΑ, ΣΤΑ ΜΟΙΡΑΙΑ 
ΣΤΑ ΡΑΝΤΕΒΟΥ ΜΕ ΤΗ ΘΕΑ 

ΣΤΑ ΚΑΛΥΤΕΡΑ ΠΟΥ ΕΛΚΟΝΤΑΙ 
Σ' ΑΥΤΑ ΠΟΥ ΕΛΕΓΧΟΝΤΑΙ 
ΣΤΑ ΕΡΩΤΕΥΜΕΝΑ, ΣΤΑ ΤΥΧΑΙΑ 
ΠΟΥ ΤΑ ΖΟΥΜΕ ΠΑΡΕΑ 

ΜΙΑ ΠΡΟΠΟΣΗ ΜΑΖΙ ΜΕ ΦΙΛΟΥΣ:
ΣΤΗΝ ΥΓΕΙΑ ΜΑΣ ΡΕ ΠΑΙΔΙΑ 
ΑΓΑΠΑΤΕ ΚΑΤΑΛΛΗΛΟΥΣ 

ΜΟΥ ΕΙΠΕΣ «ΠΟΙΑ ΕΙΣΑΙ; ΝΑ 'ΞΕΡΑ...»
ΕΠΕΜΕΝΕΣ ΩΣ ΤΑ ΧΑΡΑΜΑΤΑ 
ΣΟΥ ΕΙΠΑ «ΠΑΨΕ, ΝΑ ΒΙΑΖΕΣΑΙ»

ΜΑ ΚΑΘΕ ΠΡΑΓΜΑ ΣΤΟΝ ΚΑΙΡΟ ΤΟΥ 
ΚΑΙ Ο ΕΡΩΤΑΣ ΑΠΟΨΕ...

snippet.title: The Odyssey | Official Countdown Trailer
snippet.description:
The Odyssey - In Theaters 7 17 26

Christopher Nolan’s next film, The Odyssey, is a mythic action epic shot across the world using brand new IMAX® film technology. The film brings Homer’s foundational saga to IMAX® film screens for the first time and opens in theaters everywhere on July 17, 2026. 

The Odyssey stars Matt Damon, Tom Holland, Anne Hathaway, Robert Pattinson and Lupita Nyong’o, with Zendaya and Charlize Theron.

The Odyssey is produced by Emma Thomas and Christopher Nolan for their company, Syncopy. The executive producer is Thomas Hayslip.

snippet.title: Avatar Aang: The Last Airbender | Official Movie Trailer | Paramount+ | Avatar
snippet.description:
Avatar Aang: The Last Airbender premieres July 25 on Paramount+.

Based on the animated series created by Michael Dante DiMartino and Bryan Konietzko, this new story in the Avatar universe sees Aang learn of an ancient power that could save his culture from extinction. With the help of his friends, he embarks on a global quest to find it before it falls into the wrong hands and threatens to upend the peace they sacrificed everything to achieve.

Watch More Avatar ➡️ https://bit.ly/4vDnUE3

Welcome to the Avatar: The Last Airbender channel – the ultimate home for all things Avatar! Here you will find the best battles, deep dives, and the most memorable moments from all of your favorite characters from Aang to Zuko. On top of that, there will be plenty of Legend of Korra, official Avatar Comics, and even more exciting original content! You don’t need a sky bison to swing on by to the Avatar: The Last Airbender channel for all our new videos!

Subscribe to join Team Avatar and be the first to get notified of exclusive original content you won’t find anywhere else!

snippet.title: Νίκος Μακρόπουλος - Ορκίσου | Official Audio Release
snippet.description:
Στίχοι - Μουσική: Γιάννης Λιόντος

Διεύθυνση Παραγωγής: Νίκος Μακρόπουλος & Αντρέας Γιατράκος
Executive Producer: Λορέντζος Μακρόπουλος
Ενορχήστρωση & Παραγωγή: Αντρέας Γιατράκος
Μίξη & Mastering:Αντρέας Γιατράκος

Κιθάρες,Πλήκτρα,Programming - Αντρέας Γιατράκος
Μπάσσο - Γιάννης Γρηγορίου
Μπουζούκια,Μπαγλαμά - Θανάσης Πετρέλης
Ακουστική κιθάρα - Βασίλης Δήμας

Graphic Design: blankpage - LAB OF CONCEPTION

Είσαι ότι πιο όμορφο ποτέ μου έχει συμβεί
η αναπνοή και ο θάνατος μου
είσαι ο μόνος λόγος
που υπάρχω στη ζωή
φίλος άνθρωπος και σύντροφος μου

Μόνο αν είσαι δίπλα μου μπορώ να ονειρευτώ
κι όλα να τα πραγματοποιήσω
σ’ έχω πάνω κι από τον ίδιο μου τον εαυτό
να ´ξερες το πόσο σ’ αγαπώ

Ορκίσου πως
μόνο ο Θεός
θα μας χωρίσει όταν το θελήσει αυτός
ούτε στιγμή ούτε λεπτό
δεν το μπορώ να το σκεφτώ
να μείνω χώρια σου
δεν θέλω να δεχθώ
θέλω την κάθε ανατολή
να την μοιράζομαι μαζί
με ότι πιο ωραίο έχω στη ζωή

Οταν σε κοιτάζω τον παράδεισο κοιτώ
μες στα δυο σου μάτια ταξιδεύω
ότι με στενοχωρεί αμέσως το ξεχνώ
και στην αγκαλιά σου δραπετεύω

snippet.title: SPIDER-MAN: BRAND NEW DAY – New Trailer (4K)
snippet.description:
The world may have forgotten Peter Parker, but he hasn't forgotten them. 

Watch the new trailer for #SpiderManBrandNewDay, in theatres July 31. Tickets on sale NOW.

July 31, 2026

It's a BRAND NEW DAY for Peter Parker. Fighting crime full-time as Spider-Man in a world that doesn’t remember him—and the pressure of seeing his old friends move on without him—sparks a change in Peter he may not have the power to control. But that transformation might also be the only thing that can stop a shocking new threat to the city and those he loves - a powerful villain no one can even see.
The world may have forgotten Peter Parker, but he hasn’t forgotten them.

Directed by:   
Destin Daniel Cretton   
 
Written by: 
Chris McKenna & Erik Sommers and Justin Kuritzkes
   
Based on the MARVEL Comic Book by:

snippet.description:
A new saga begins! Black Clover Second Season is coming to Crunchyroll in 2026! Watch Black Clover on Crunchyroll! https://got.cr/cc-bcpv

In a world where magic is everything, Asta and Yuno are both found abandoned at a church on the same day. While Yuno is gifted with exceptional magical powers, Asta is the only one in this world without any. At the age of fifteen, both receive grimoires, magic books that amplify their holder’s magic. Asta’s is a rare Grimoire of Anti-Magic that negates and repels his opponent’s spells. Being opposite but good rivals, Yuno and Asta are ready for the hardest of challenges to achieve their common dream: to be the Wizard King. Giving up is never an option!

snippet.title: Cyberpunk: Edgerunners 2 | Official Teaser 2
snippet.description:
Look alive, choom — Cyberpunk: Edgerunners 2 is coming your way this Fall!

Gear up for a return to the world of Cyberpunk, where only the ruthless survive and one wrong move can get you flatlined. This standalone story throws a fresh cast of characters into the darkest corners of Night City and brings a raw, gritty take on the world of the future. Lawless and unforgiving, this is Night City at its most brutal. 

Brought to you by CD PROJEKT RED and TRIGGER, Cyberpunk: Edgerunners 2 is directed by Kai Ikarashi (Cyberpunk: Edgerunners, SSSS.Gridman), with Kanno Ichigo (Promare, Cyberpunk: Edgerunners) as the lead designer and Hugo Award winner Bartosz Sztybor as showrunner, story writer, and producer.

TRAILER MUSIC
Original Score by Tsuneo Imahori
“You Can't Run From Me” — written by Maria Kelly and Drew Polovick, performed by Rico Nasty, produced by Drew Polovick, mixed and mastered by Elliot Polokoff

Coming to Netflix, Fall 2026. 

Stay connected:
cyberpunk.net/edgerunners2
x.com/edgerunners
facebook.com/edgerunners
instagram.com/Edgerunners

Want to experience Night City on a deeper level? Play Cyberpunk 2077 and carve your own path through the dark future.
